title: Itti Si Khushi
subTitle: After rescuing Chidiya from a dangerous stunt, Anvita learns that Sanjay gave Chidiya the phone. As Sanjay raises his hand at Chidiya, will this become the breaking point in Anvita and Sanjay's marriage?

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Daya tells Jethalal that his brother Sundar is very busy in Ahmedabad as many people call him for their business inauguration. Meanwhile, Jethalal gets worried after Daya tells him that Sundar might be missing him that is why he is getting hiccups.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal decides to go to Surat for his friend's anniversary party. Meanwhile, Jethalal calls Daya to tell.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal asks Iyer and confirms that there is a lack of water in the society. Popatlal decides to call Bhide.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The society members decide to check the water tank to find the reason behind water blockage. Meanwhile, everyone finds out.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The society members get worried to find an unknown bag in the water tank. Everyone gets scared thinking it contains a bomb. Meanwhile, Sodhi decides to open the bag and discovers a bag full of demonetized notes. Who put the money in the water tank?

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Society members get worried after discovering demonetized currency notes in the water tank. Champaklal gets furious at society members for doubting Jethalal. With the collective votes, everyone decides to keep the bag in the society office.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: A call about black money prompts Inspector Chalu Pandey to visit Gokuldham. Later, he finds the cash and questions residents.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide gets terrified after getting a nightmare of being arrested by Chalu Pandey. Bhide decides to ask Taarak about Jetha.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Society members get shocked to see Champaklal and Tappu in the society with Nattu Kaka and Bagha.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal confirms that the bag with all the demonetized currency does not belong to him. Meanwhile, Madhavi tells everyone.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide gets happy after the problem in the society gets solved. Popatlal feels sad about preparing food for himself.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Popatlal is adamant to buy a phone from society's funds and threatens the residents that he will jump from the clubhouse if he does not served for his damages.

title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
subTitle: Devi Sati stands before King Daksha and declares her final decision to accept Mahadev as her husband. Will Daksha accept her choice, or will his pride stand in the way?

title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
subTitle: Prajapati Daksha organises a swayamvar for Devi Sati, but she declares that she has already chosen her husband. Later, at Daksha's insistence, Devi Sati calls upon Mahadev. How will Prajapati Daksha respond?

title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
subTitle: Daksha's pride turns into a father's betrayal as he rejects Sati's marriage and taints the ceremony with a curse. With Sati's honor at stake, the stage is set for Lord Shiva's divine wrath.

subTitle: Amidst divine challenges, Lord Shiva and Parvati, along with their sons Ganesha and Kartikeya, explore the dynamics of love, sacrifice, and family bonds.

subTitle: All hell breaks loose when Haseena comes face to face with her impostor. Soon, the duo gets into a fight with each other.

subTitle: As Haseena comes face to face with her impostor, Rani, Karishma keeps a close eye on the duo. Later, she vows to uncover Haseena's true colours in front of the whole world.

title: Maddam Sir
subTitle: Haseena begins to grow frustrated and takes her anger out on the others. However, when she learns that evidence of her innocence has been found, she quickly becomes relieved again.

title: Maddam Sir
subTitle: Haseena and her team are shocked to learn that there is a fake police station in their vicinity. Meanwhile, Haseena's nemesis sets up a trap for her.
